description: A developer is starting a new project and must oversee the initial site preparation.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all necessary erosion control measures are in place before work begins, as required by local regulations.

expected_outcome.expected: The site is compliant with environmental regulations.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the work of the excavation contractor to ensure they are clearing the site and grading it according to the approved civil engineering plans.

expected_outcome.expected: The site work is proceeding according to plan.

nodes.task_description: Review and approve the contractor's invoices for the site work.

expected_outcome.expected: Invoices are approved for payment after verifying the work was completed.
